news.headline: UN report exposes brutal reality for Palestinians in Gaza, West Bank
news.summary:
Palestinian civilians are caught between “mass atrocities” of Israeli forces, settlers and Hamas’ brutal rule, a UN-mandated inquiry said on Tuesday.
Civilians across war-ravaged Gaza and the occupied West Bank are being “systematically and deliberately” subjected to severe rights violations, the UN

news.headline: ‘Historic’ wave of Palestinian solidarity grows at universities in Germany
news.summary: Calls for universities to cut ties with Israeli institutions are rising in the country that condemns the BDS movement.
